enableSearchHistory.description: Label for the search history toggle

description.message: Eine schöne neue Tab-Seite mit Uhr, Suche, Apps und Aufgabenliste

todoReminderTitle.description: Title for the todo reminder notification

todoReminderMessage.description: Notification body for todo reminder. $1$ is the task text, $2$ is the due date display.

weatherWidgetCloseLabel.description: Accessible label for the weather app close button

todoSubtasks.description: Label for the subtasks section in the todo edit modal

todoAddSubtask.description: Placeholder text for the subtask input field

todoSubtaskDelete.description: Tooltip for the subtask delete button

playbackControls.description: Sub-header for video playback controls in the Live Background section

rotationOptions.description: Sub-header for rotation controls in the Rotation section

bgRotation.description: Section header for background rotation settings

bgRotationToggle.description: Label for the background rotation toggle

bgRotationInterval.description: Label for the rotation interval selector

bgRotationPicker.description: Label for the background picker in rotation settings

bgRotationNext.description: Button to manually advance to next background

uploadBackground.description: Tooltip for the upload background image button

uploadLiveBackground.description: Tooltip for the upload live background video button

eyeCareReminderEnabled.description: Toggle for the eye-care break reminder

eyeCareReminderDescription.message: Befolge die 20-20-20-Regel mit einer sanften Pausenerinnerung, solange dieser Tab sichtbar ist.
eyeCareReminderDescription.description: Description for the eye-care reminder setting

eyeCareReminderInterval.description: Label for the eye-care reminder interval selector

eyeCareReminderInterval15.description: Eye-care reminder interval option for 15 minutes

eyeCareReminderInterval20.description: Eye-care reminder interval option for 20 minutes

eyeCareReminderInterval30.description: Eye-care reminder interval option for 30 minutes

eyeCareReminderInterval45.description: Eye-care reminder interval option for 45 minutes

eyeCareReminderInterval60.description: Eye-care reminder interval option for 60 minutes

eyeCareReminderBrowserNotification.description: Toggle for browser notifications when an eye-care break is due

eyeCareReminderTitle.description: Title shown in the eye-care reminder banner

eyeCareReminderCountdown.message: Schau 20 Sekunden lang auf etwas, das etwa 6 Meter entfernt ist
eyeCareReminderCountdown.description: Countdown instruction for the eye-care reminder banner

eyeCareReminderFinished.message: Pause beendet. Mach weiter, wenn du bereit bist.
eyeCareReminderFinished.description: Message shown when the eye-care countdown finishes

eyeCareReminderSkip.description: Button label to skip the current eye-care reminder

eyeCareReminderDone.description: Button label to dismiss the completed eye-care reminder

eyeCareReminderNotificationBody.message: Schau 20 Sekunden lang auf etwas, das etwa 6 Meter entfernt ist.
eyeCareReminderNotificationBody.description: Body text for the browser notification when an eye-care break is due

enableTodoStats.description: Toggle for enabling daily todo statistics

completedToday.description: Stats label for tasks completed today

completedThisWeek.description: Stats label for tasks completed this week

statsToggle.description: Label for the stats toggle button

statsToggleAriaLabel.description: Accessible label for the stats toggle button

heatmapCellTitle.description: Tooltip for heatmap cells. $1$ is the date, $2$ is the number of completed tasks.
